compatibilityLabel: react-test-renderer@19.2.6 runtime export and descriptor oracle

generation.method: exact npm tarballs extracted into a temporary node_modules tree and probed through isolated Node child processes
generation.probeIsolation: one Node child process per react-test-renderer subpath, condition, warning scenario, and shallow invocation mode

probeModes.reason: Default Node development selects the development CJS facade, captures export descriptors, and surfaces the create() deprecation warning.
Default Node production selects the production CJS facade and records production-only export value differences.
The package has no react-server branch, so the condition reaches the React peer and exposes unsupported renderer loading behavior.
Production react-server loading is recorded separately because direct development CJS loading is gated by NODE_ENV.

conditionModes.reason: Baseline Node resolution without custom conditions.
React Server Components condition; react-test-renderer has no export map branch, but its React peer does.
Custom browser condition as resolved by Node; no package exports map means physical CommonJS paths still resolve.
Custom worker condition as resolved by Node; no package exports map means physical CommonJS paths still resolve.
Custom edge-light condition as resolved by Node; no package exports map means physical CommonJS paths still resolve.
Custom workerd condition as resolved by Node; no package exports map means physical CommonJS paths still resolve.
Custom bun condition as resolved by Node; no package exports map means physical CommonJS paths still resolve.
Custom deno condition as resolved by Node; no package exports map means physical CommonJS paths still resolve.

createWarningScenarios.reason: Development create() emits the react-test-renderer deprecation warning when the React Native test global is not set.
Development create() suppresses the deprecation warning when IS_REACT_NATIVE_TEST_ENVIRONMENT is true.
Production create() does not include the development warning call.
Production create() remains warning-free even with the React Native test global set.

unsupportedFastReactEvidence.reason: Fast React has no JS react-test-renderer facade in this write scope; this oracle records React package behavior only.

intentionalGaps.reason: This oracle records pinned react-test-renderer package behavior only; Fast React test-renderer JS compatibility is not claimed.
Root lifecycle, update, act scheduling, serialization, and TestInstance behavior are assigned to later react-test-renderer oracle workers.
Browser custom-condition evidence is Node resolver evidence, not execution in a browser runtime.
